# The Endurance Group

> B2B sales execution and AI automation consultancy based in Portland, Maine, founded in 1998. We build flat-fee AI automations and run hands-on sales execution and growth-systems work for B2B companies in real estate, technology, and professional services.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://theendurancegroup.com/): What we do and how we work — AI automations, sales execution, and growth systems, built and maintained, not just advised.
- [Solutions](https://theendurancegroup.com/solutions.html): The three things we do — AI Automations, Sales Execution, and Growth Systems & Ops.
- [Pricing](https://theendurancegroup.com/pricing.html): Flat-fee tiers for automation builds ($750–$5,500 to build, $200/mo–$1,400/mo to maintain). The first automation is free.
- [Industries](https://theendurancegroup.com/industries.html): Real Estate, B2B Technology & SaaS, and Professional Services — the three industries we specialize in.
- [Success](https://theendurancegroup.com/success.html): Case studies and client testimonials, including Offerpad, Realty ONE Group, FenestraPro, and Huron.
- [About](https://theendurancegroup.com/about.html): Company history and the people behind it — President Jim Sullivan and Vice President Conor Sullivan.
- [Claim Your Free Automation](https://theendurancegroup.com/free-automation.html): Get one real, working automation built and installed for free, no commitment after.
- [Privacy Policy](https://theendurancegroup.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://theendurancegroup.com/terms.html)

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog.html): Guides on AI automation, sales execution, and growth systems, organized by solution and by industry.
- [How AI automation helps real estate teams respond to leads before they go cold](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/ai-automation-real-estate.html)
- [Why generic outbound automation fails B2B SaaS, and what to build instead](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/ai-automation-b2b-saas.html)
- [Why professional services firms should map their network before they prospect](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/ai-automation-professional-services.html)
- [What counts as a real AI automation, and what's just a demo](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/what-is-an-ai-automation.html)
- [When it makes sense to outsource sales execution instead of hiring an SDR](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/outsourced-sales-execution-guide.html)
- [Why adding more leads won't fix a broken CRM](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/fix-crm-before-more-leads.html)
- [What Claude Skills are, and why we build inside Claude instead of a new app](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/claude-skills.html)
- [What custom GPTs are, and why we build inside ChatGPT instead of a new app](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/openai-custom-gpts.html)
- [What Gemini Gems are, and why we build inside Google Workspace instead of a new app](https://theendurancegroup.com/blog/gemini-gems.html)

## Authors

- [Jim Sullivan](https://theendurancegroup.com/authors/jim-sullivan.html): Founder.
- [Conor Sullivan](https://theendurancegroup.com/authors/conor-sullivan.html): Leads AI implementation, automation architecture, and product development.
- [Nolan Cary](https://theendurancegroup.com/authors/nolan-cary.html): Director of Sales Execution.
- [Maria Jose Pava](https://theendurancegroup.com/authors/maria-jose-pava.html): Director of AI Solutions and Delivery.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Pricing is flat-fee, not hourly: four build tiers from $750 to $5,500, with monthly maintenance from $200/mo to $1,400/mo. The first automation is always free.
- "Schedule a Call" links across the site point to https://meetings.hubspot.com/conor-sullivan/follow-up-with-conor.
- Commonality is The Endurance Group's proprietary social-capital tool, used to find warm outreach paths into prospects through shared schools, past employers, and mutual connections.
- The company serves three industries: Real Estate, B2B Technology & SaaS, and Professional Services.
